text.title: docker-compose Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for docker-compose as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.description: Using sleep 30 after docker compose up -d in CI to "wait for services to start".
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Sleep values that work in test become flaky on slower runners and waste time on faster ones. Use --wait with proper health checks instead.
